discardRegistration.title: Discard registration?
discardRegistration.description: Your email has already been verified. If you leave now, you will need to resend the code to continue later.

email.title: Recover password
email.description: Enter the email linked to your account and we will send a code.
email.genericNotice: If the email exists, we will send a verification code.

password.title: Set a new password
password.description: Choose a secure password to finish recovery.

success.title: Password updated
success.description: Your password was updated successfully. You can now sign in.

email.title: Create your account
email.description: Enter your email to get started. We'll send you a verification code.

profile.title: Tell us about yourself
profile.description: Enter your name and contact details. This information will appear on your profile.

validation.phoneInvalid: Enter a valid phone number (7-20 digits)

password.title: Choose a password
password.description: Create a secure password with 8 to 32 characters, uppercase letters, numbers, and symbols.

validation.uppercase: Include at least one uppercase letter
validation.specialCharacter: Include at least one special character (!@#$...)

criteria.length: Password must be 8 to 32 characters long.
criteria.uppercase: Include at least one uppercase letter.

success.title: Your account is ready
success.description: Registration completed successfully. You can now sign in with your email and password.

error.title: We couldn't create your account
error.defaultMessage: There was a connection or validation issue. Review your details and try again.

header.title: Account and profile
header.description: Manage your personal info, photo, email, and credentials.

identity.title: Identity
identity.hint: Quick summary of your current account.

personal.title: Personal details
personal.hint: Update your name and phone independently.

photo.title: Profile photo
photo.hint: Upload a new image for your avatar.
photo.description: You can pick an image from your device and save it when you're ready.
photo.requirements: Upload one JPG, PNG, or WEBP image up to 5 MB.

validation.single: You can only upload one image at a time.
validation.format: Use a JPG, PNG, or WEBP image.
validation.size: That image is too large. Use a file up to 5 MB.

email.title: Email address
email.hint: Change your email in a short verification flow.
email.requestSuccessDescription: We sent a code to the new email to confirm the change.
email.verifyNotice: Enter the code sent to {{email}} to complete the change.

sessionDialog.errorTitle: We could not update your email

password.title: Password
password.hint: Update your password without affecting the rest of your profile.

sessionDialog.errorTitle: We could not update your password

delete.title: Delete account
delete.hint: Sensitive action that will sign you out and remove your access.
delete.cardDescription: Review this decision carefully. Once completed, you will no longer be able to sign in with this account.
delete.dialogDescription: This action will sign you out and remove your access. To confirm, type
delete.dialogWarning: This action can affect your information and revoke your access immediately.

header.title: Preferences
header.description: Adjust the language and look of Spazio so it feels more comfortable for you.

language.sectionHint: Choose the language you want to use across the app.
language.cardDescription: Switch menus, buttons, and messages whenever you want.

appearance.sectionHint: Make the app look the way that feels best for you.
appearance.themeDescription: Pick a light or dark look, or let Spazio follow your device settings.
appearance.fontDescription: Turn on a reading-friendly font to make text feel easier across the app.

staff.title: Create staff user
staff.description: Create an admin or agent account and deliver the temporary password to the user.
staff.temporaryPasswordDescription: It will remain visible until you leave this view.
staff.copySuccessDescription: You can now share it with the user.
staff.shareHint: Share this password with the user and ask them to change it from their account after signing in.
staff.emptyState: When you create a staff user, the temporary password will appear here.
staff.forbiddenDescription: Only an administrator can create staff users.
